title: verbascum × polyphyllopyramidatum
intro: Verbascum × polyphyllopyramidatum, also known as the mullein-verbascum hybrid, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Scrophulariaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its high mucilage content. The health benefits of Verbascum × polyphyllopyramidatum include soothing respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for their medicinal properties.
